mapper.select: SELECT B.ID, B.BILL_NO, B.CLOSE_NO, B.VD_CD, B.VD_NM, TO_CHAR(B.BILL_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS BILL_YMD, B.BILL_TYP, B.SUPPLY_AMT, B.VAT_AMT, B.TOT_AMT, B.BILL_STS, S.CD_NM_KO AS BILL_STS_NM, B.NTS_STATUS, B.REG_ID FROM TX_TAXBILL B LEFT JOIN CM_CODE S ON S.GRP_CD='TB_STS' AND S.CD=B.BILL_STS AND S.DEL_YN='N' WHERE B.DEL_YN='N' AND (B.BILL_NO LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' OR B.VD_NM LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' OR B.CLOSE_NO LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%') AND B.BILL_STS=#{billSts} ORDER BY B.ID DESC

SELECT B.ID, B.COMP_CD, B.BILL_NO, B.CLOSE_ID, B.CLOSE_NO, B.VD_CD, B.VD_NM, TO_CHAR(B.BILL_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS BILL_YMD, B.BILL_TYP, B.SUPPLY_AMT, B.VAT_AMT, B.TOT_AMT, B.BILL_STS, S.CD_NM_KO AS BILL_STS_NM, B.NTS_STATUS, B.NTS_APPROVAL_NO, TO_CHAR(B.WRITE_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS WRITE_YMD, TO_CHAR(B.ISSUE_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS ISSUE_YMD, B.SUP_BIZ_NO, B.SUP_NM, B.SUP_CEO, B.SUP_ADDR, B.BUY_BIZ_NO, B.BUY_NM, B.BUY_CEO, B.BUY_ADDR, B.BILL_KIND, B.ORIG_BILL_NO, B.MODIFY_RSN, B.REMARK, B.REG_ID FROM TX_TAXBILL B LEFT JOIN CM_CODE S ON S.GRP_CD='TB_STS' AND S.CD=B.BILL_STS AND S.DEL_YN='N' WHERE B.ID=#{id} AND B.DEL_YN='N'
SELECT BIZ_NO AS SUP_BIZ_NO, VD_NM AS SUP_NM, CEO_NM AS SUP_CEO, ADDR AS SUP_ADDR FROM VD_VENDOR WHERE VD_CD=#{vdCd} AND DEL_YN='N'
SELECT BIZ_NO AS BUY_BIZ_NO, COMP_NM AS BUY_NM, CEO_NM AS BUY_CEO, ADDR AS BUY_ADDR FROM CM_COMPANY WHERE COMP_CD=#{compCd}
SELECT ID, BILL_ID, LINE_NO, ITEM_CD, ITEM_NM, SPEC, QTY, UNIT_PRC, SUPPLY_AMT, VAT_AMT, REMARK FROM TX_TAXBILL_ITEM WHERE BILL_ID=#{billId} ORDER BY LINE_NO
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TX_TAXBILL_ITEM (BILL_ID, LINE_NO, ITEM_CD, ITEM_NM, SPEC, QTY, UNIT_PRC, SUPPLY_AMT, VAT_AMT, REMARK, REG_ID) VALUES (#{billId}, #{lineNo}, #{itemCd}, #{itemNm}, #{spec}, NVL(#{qty},0), NVL(#{unitPrc},0), NVL(#{supplyAmt},0), NVL(#{vatAmt},0), #{remark}, #{regId})
mapper.select: SELECT GI.ITEM_CD, MAX(GI.ITEM_NM) AS ITEM_NM, MAX(GI.SPEC) AS SPEC, SUM(GI.GR_QTY) AS QTY, SUM(GI.AMT) AS SUPPLY_AMT, SUM(CASE WHEN NVL(GI.TAX_TYP,'TAX')='TAX' THEN ROUND(GI.AMT*0.1) ELSE 0 END) AS VAT_AMT FROM CL_CLOSE_GR CG JOIN GR_RECEIPT_ITEM GI ON GI.RECEIPT_ID = CG.GR_ID WHERE CG.CLOSE_ID=#{closeId} GROUP BY GI.ITEM_CD ORDER BY GI.ITEM_CD
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TX_TAXBILL (COMP_CD, BILL_NO, CLOSE_ID, CLOSE_NO, VD_CD, VD_NM, BILL_YMD, WRITE_YMD, BILL_TYP, SUP_BIZ_NO, SUP_NM, SUP_CEO, SUP_ADDR, BUY_BIZ_NO, BUY_NM, BUY_CEO, BUY_ADDR, BILL_KIND, SUPPLY_AMT, VAT_AMT, TOT_AMT, BILL_STS, REMARK, REG_ID, MOD_ID) VALUES (#{compCd}, #{billNo}, #{closeId}, #{closeNo}, #{vdCd}, #{vdNm}, TO_DATE(#{billYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{writeYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), NVL(#{billTyp},'TAX'), #{supBizNo}, #{supNm}, #{supCeo}, #{supAddr}, #{buyBizNo}, #{buyNm}, #{buyCeo}, #{buyAddr}, NVL(#{billKind},'NORMAL'), NVL(#{supplyAmt},0), NVL(#{vatAmt},0), NVL(#{totAmt},0), 'DRAFT', #{remark}, #{regId}, #{regId})
mapper.update: UPDATE TX_TAXBILL SET BILL_STS=#{billSts}, NTS_STATUS=NVL(#{ntsStatus}, NTS_STATUS), MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE TX_TAXBILL SET BILL_STS='SENT', NTS_STATUS=#{ntsStatus}, NTS_APPROVAL_NO=#{ntsApprovalNo}, ISSUE_YMD=TO_DATE(#{issueYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE TX_TAXBILL SET DEL_YN='Y', MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TX_TAXBILL WHERE CLOSE_ID=#{closeId} AND DEL_YN='N' AND BILL_STS<>'CANCEL'
